steps.title: Identify the time frame established in the first sentence
steps.content: ”In this chapter, we will focus on…” uses future tense, establishing what the chapter will accomplish.

steps.title: Apply the rule of verb tense consistency
steps.content: The rule is verb tense consistency: related actions in the same narrative must use the same tense, so “will turn” matches “will focus.” The others violate this by using past tense (B, C) or future perfect (A). That matches choice D — D is correct.
